unit_square.description: Plain 0..1 floats. x=0,y=0 is top-left; x=1,y=1 is bottom-right. Pixel coords: px_x = v * screenW, px_y = v * screenH.

safezone.description: SafeZone expression strings. x = <frac> * safezoneW + safezoneX. 16:9 preview constants: safezoneX=0.07, safezoneY=0.07, safezoneW=0.86, safezoneH=0.86.
